name_en: Top quality with full set packaging
name_cn:
Top quality with full set packaging
Medium Caramel Brown in stock!!️
Travel with Toujours, oversized quilted design paired with classic lettering accessories, very modern and stylish. The bag structure is very soft, calfskin material feels premium, unique buckle clasp that folds the sides when closed. Capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for storing small items.
size:28.5*19*21cm
